title: Fullstack web
description: I've made my fair share of fullstack websites. From backend to frontend, going by the database and finishing with the deployment, making a website has no secrets for me. My prominent skills are Springboot and React.

title: Mobile dev
description: I also tried some mobile development. By working on a production ready app during my internship at MyGamePlan and making a Animal Crossing Index in my free time, I have become quite proficient at making apps with React Native and Expo.
